society_skills.adventuring.steadfast.des: 20%% chance to heal a heart when hurt
Gives the ability to use the §6Dragontooth Axe
society_skills.adventuring.looting_tycoo:
🗡 Adventurer products worth 100%% more.

§cDoes not stack with previous skills.
Adds a smash attack to the Dragontooth Axe that only targets hostiles

§cShift + Left click to use
society_skills.adventuring.handleshot.de:
Adds a ranged ability to the Dragontooth Axe

§cShift + Right click to use
Chance to find §6Relic Troves§7 in loot chests
society_skills.adventuring.artifact_hunt: Chance to find §6Artifact Troves§7 in loot chests
society_skills.adventuring.prismatic_rea: Chance to find §dPrismatic Shards§7 in loot chests
society_skills.farming.category.title: Farming
society_skills.farming.soil_inspector.de: Chance to dig up §6Plant Nutrients§7 when manually harvesting crops.
society_skills.farming.sticky_crops.desc: Chance to find §6Pine Tar§7 when manually harvesting crops.
society_skills.farming.aged_prize.descri: §65%%§7 chance to find §6Prize Tickets§7 when collecting from §6Aging Cask§7.
society_skills.farming.artful_tycoon.des:
✎ Artisan products worth 80%% more.

§cDoes not stack with previous skills.
society_skills.farming.rancher.descripti: §620%%§7 chance for §6Artisan Cheese Presses§7, §6Mayo Machines§7, and §6Looms§7 to output double.
society_skills.farming.reaping_scythe.de: Farm animals have a chance to gift a §6Heart of Diamond§7.
society_skills.farming.tree_whisperer.de: Fruit trees drop +2 fruit when manually harvesting.
society_skills.farming.crop_collector.de: Crops drop double outputs when manually harvesting.
Adds ability to use §6Ancient Goddess Statues.
society_skills.fishing.category.title: Fishing
society.skills.fishing.fly_fisher.descri: +1 fish when caught using any rod.
society.skills.fishing.hot_hands.descrip:
Taking out fish born in Fish Ponds smokes them.

§c25%% chance they get charred into coal.
Double rolls for §6Jelly§7 from fishing. Chance to find §6Furniture Boxes§7 from fishing.
society.skills.fishing.frozen_treasure.d: High Chance to find §6Treasure Chests§7 when catching fish in Winter.
society.skills.fishing.school_fisher.des: +3 fish when caught using any rod.
Neptune's Bounties drops a §dPrismatic Shard§7 when mined without Silk Touch.
society.skills.fishing.scum_collector.de:
Doubles chance of receiving non-roe items from ponds.
§aStacks with Sea Biscuits.
society.skills.fishing.mitosis.descripti: Doubles a fish being retrieved from Fish Ponds if it was born there.
society_skills.husbandry.category.title: Husbandry
society_skills.husbandry.healing.descrip: All healing provides an extra 5%% health
society_skills.husbandry.bribery.descrip: Using a §6Gold Coin§7 on a farm animal increases affection by 1 and makes it gain affection faster
society_skills.husbandry.biomancer.descr: Right clicking a farm animal with a §6Knife§7 exchanges affection for §6Heart of Diamond. They need to trust you first.
society_skills.husbandry.sacrificial_lam: Killing a §6Sheep§7 passes half of its affection to some nearby farm animals, except other sheep
society_skills.husbandry.transplanting.d: Using a §6Heart of Diamond§7 on a farm animal adds a heart of affection
society_skills.husbandry.coopmaster.desc: Birds have a small chance to give §6Golden Eggs§7 and Rabbits give double items
society_skills.husbandry.bff.description: Animals can be given a Friendship Necklace to have a small chance of gifting a §dPrismatic Shard§7 at max affection.
society_skills.husbandry.clockwork.descr: Using a §6Precision Mechanism§7 on a Farm animal prevents its affection from decreasing from deployers.
society_skills.husbandry.heretic.descrip: Using Magic Shears painfully extracts 3 §6Sparkstone§7 from the animal.
society_skills.mining.category.title: Mining
society_skills.mining.furniture_archaeol: Chance to find §6Furniture Boxes§7 when mining ore.
society_skills.mining.excavator.descript: Adds additional roll for geodes when mining ore.
society_skills.mining.mineralogist.descr: Chance to find crafting minerals when mining ore.
society_skills.mining.prismatic_prospect: Chance to find §dPrismatic Shard§7 from Geode Nodes.
society_skills.mining.blockchain.descrip: Chance to find §6Gold Coins§7 when mining ore.
society_skills.mining.gold_rush.descript: Mining non-nether §6Gold Ore§7 drops 4 §6Blocks of Raw Gold.
society_skills.mining.filthy_excavator.d: Chance to find §6Geodes§7 when mining Deepslate and §6Magma Geodes§7 in Netherrack.
society_skills.mining.gem_tycoon.descrip:
🎣 Geologist products worth 50%% more.

§cDoes not stack with previous skills.
society_skills.mining.star_blessing.desc:
Chance to find §6Pristine Star Shards§7 when mining ore

§aChance increases in the Nether and Skull Cavern.
society_skills.mastery.category.title: Mastery
society_skills.mastery.farming_mastery.d:
Market now sells §dSpark-Pods§7 and §dMystic Willow Saplings§7.
Harvesting crops has a chance to drop §dGrimwood Saplings§7.
society_skills.mastery.husbandry_mastery:
You can now find §dAnimal Crackers§7 and §fPlushie Capsules§7 in the world.
Wizard now sells §dSunlit Crystals§7.
society_skills.mastery.mining_mastery.de:
Trader now offers the §dRecycled Core§7 for barter.
Blacksmith now sells Statue of the §dMoon Dwarf§7.
society_skills.mastery.fishing_mastery.d:
Fisher now sells the §dRoe Recycler§7.
Fisher now sells §dNeedle Bobber§7 and §dNet Bobber§7.
society_skills.mastery.adventuring_maste:
Guild now sells items to upgrade pets.
Wizard now sells the §dEnchanting Table§7.
society_skills.books.category.title: Books
society_skills.books.alias_moss.descript: Mossberries can be found in any season.
society_skills.books.animal_fancy.descri: Increases affection gained from petting farm animals.
society_skills.books.bullfish_jobs.descr: The quality of fish taken out of Fish Ponds scales with population.
society_skills.books.canadian_and_famous: Tappers output double. Doesn't affect Auto-Tappers.
society_skills.books.debt_caverns.descri: Fainting in the Skull Cavern no longer costs a fee or adds to debt.
society_skills.books.first_aid_guide.des: Halves the maximum fee and debt from death.
society_skills.books.frogs_bounty_bazaar: Prize Tickets give double the prizes.
society_skills.books.hitting_hard_and_so: Melee attacks do an extra 4 damage.
society_skills.books.intro_to_algorithms: Mining Lead ore no longer causes Brain Damage clouds.
society_skills.books.no_name_for_the_she: Naming animals grants an additional heart of affection.
society_skills.books.phenomenology_of_tr: Artifacts and Relics are worth 200%% more.
society_skills.books.slime_contain_prote: Incubating a Slime Heart has a chance to give you a Slime Ticket.
society_skills.books.slouching_towards_a: Artisan Hoppers have a +5%% chance to not consume Sparkstone for each day an output took to make. This only applies when harvesting from the machine.
society_skills.books.the_spark_also_rise:
mining any ore drops Sparkstone.
§6Requires Mining Mastery unlocked
society_skills.books.universal_methods_o: The Market sells all basic seeds in every season.
society_skills.books.wuthering_logs.desc: Trees have a 15%% chance to drop Fire Logs when chopped.
society_skills.books.the_quality_of_the_:
Quality impacts of non-fish farmer products on prices are doubled.
§6Requires Farming Mastery unlocked
society_skills.books.the_red_and_the_bla:
Geodes, loot crates, and Slot Machines drop one more item.
§6Requires Adventuring Mastery unlocked
society_skills.books.pond_house_five.des:
Fish Ponds will ask for half the items.
§6Requires Fishing Mastery unlocked
society_skills.books.women_who_run_with_:
Plushies will start at 2 hearts of affection.
Increases rates of high quality Plushies.
§6Requires Husbandry Mastery unlocked
